components_to_use.name: Card
components_to_use.usage: Use for Synthesis Header (the 3 metric cards) and as containers for the list sections. Keep rounded-xl and border-slate-200.

components_to_use.name: Badge
components_to_use.usage: Use to display net balance state (positive/negative) and solidarity impact tags.

sections.title: Vos résultats d'engagement
sections.description: Vue d'ensemble de vos participations et de leur impact financier.

sections.title: Détail de vos engagements
sections.description: Historique de vos rendez-vous. Cliquez sur un engagement pour voir le détail.
sections.ui_pattern: A clean vertical list inside a Card. Each row displays the appointment date, name, and a clear badge/text stating 'Vous avez reçu X€' or 'Vous avez payé Y€'.

sections.title: Votre impact solidaire
sections.description: Les contributions générées par vos engagements et reversées aux associations.
sections.ui_pattern: A distinct visually warm section (using amber-50 or emerald-50 accents) highlighting the total amount donated, followed by a breakdown per association (e.g., '10€ reversés à Restos du Cœur').

instructions_to_main_agent: Update src/components/AppNavbar.js to include a link to the '/impact' route. Label it 'Résultats financiers' or 'Impact' and place it appropriately in the navigation.
Ensure strict adherence to the existing design system (slate, emerald, red). DO NOT invent new gradient colors or shadows.
Make sure the terminology strictly follows the user-centric 'Vous avez reçu/payé' pattern. No accounting jargon.
The layout must allow the user to read their 'Total reçu', 'Total payé', 'Solde net', and 'Impact solidaire' within 3 seconds of landing on the page.
Ensure each appointment row has a clear navigation Link to '/appointments/:id'.
